sections.title: Core Values
sections.summary: [Figure f_6_10] [Figure f_6_12] [Figure f_6_9] [Figure f_6_8] [Figure f_6_11] [Figure f_6_13] MISSION, VISION AND CORE VALUES 'T o be the reinsurer of choice in Ethiopia and our chosen market' To apprehend our corporate mission and vision, the Management and staff of Ethiopian Re  stand for the mnemonic 'ETHIOPIAN': 2 Provide  dependable  reinsurance  services  both  locally  and internationally through nurturing adequate risk capacity and using  highly  trained  professionals  and  modern  Information and Communication  Technology systems. The  Company endeavours to foster market stability, high professionalism, and advancing the business of insurance paying special attention to discharging its corporate social responsibility in the process.

sections.title: Our Credit Rating
sections.summary: [Figure f_7_15] [Figure f_7_17] [Figure f_7_16] [Figure f_7_14] Global Credit Rating (GCR) Ethio-Re's initial international and national scale strength ratings of and AA (ET), respectively with a stable outlook. Ethio-Re assures that the rating was one of the 'Big Five Pillars' of the newly designed strategic  plan 'Vision 2030', and as per its time scale.

sections.title: Strategic Partnerships
sections.summary: Ethio-Re works hand-in-hand with key stakeholders to shape a resilient and forward-looking insurance ecosystem. We maintain strong partnerships with: Local and international reinsurance companies Regulatory authorities Market-leading insurance firms Together, we drive innovation, compliance, and sustainable growth across the sector.

sections.title: Training & Market Development

child_sections.title: Ethio-Re discharging its Corporate Social Responsibility
child_sections.summary: [Figure f_9_26] [Figure f_9_27] [Figure f_9_25] [Figure f_9_24] Ethio-Re has joined the Nairobi Declaration on Sustainable Insurance and become the signatory member effective 2024. Accordingly, the company is striving to integrating sustainable insurance principles into its business operations.

sections.title: Geographical scope

child_sections.title: OUR THREE PHASED STRATEGIC HORIZON INCLUDES
child_sections.summary: [Figure f_12_37] [Figure f_12_36] [Figure f_12_35] [Figure f_12_38] Ethio  Re  would  strive  to  secure  business from domestic and international markets. In the short term however it primarily  focuses  on  building  strong market base in Ethiopia and  Sub Shaharan Africa although Ethiopia will  remain  the  major  source  of  the Company's business in the foreseeable future.
